reviews.comment:
Buena atención, dentro de poco tiempo se mudan a nueva estación sobre la ruta, con más servicios

(Translated by Google)
Good service, they'll be moving to a new station on the highway soon, with more services

(Translated by Google)

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtdl92Uk13EAE

reviews.comment:
El lugar impecable .muy buena atención . Agua para el mate en dispenser .cuenta con galletitas. Agua mineral ect .lo justo y necesario para seguir viajando . Posee baños en impecable estado con jabón y secador de manos

(Translated by Google)
The place was spotless. Excellent service. They have hot water for mate in a dispenser, cookies, bottled water, etc.—just what you need to keep traveling. The bathrooms are in impeccable condition with soap and hand dryers.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtNTltZEZnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención, y orientación en un problema ajeno a su trabajo.

(Translated by Google)
Good service and guidance on a problem unrelated to their work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtNS1ua2x3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Problemas para pagar con la aplicación YPF. Los plateros cero onda para solucionarlo. Lo salvó el responsable de la estación. Busco y encontró la solución.

(Translated by Google)
Problems paying with the YPF app. The silversmiths were completely unsympathetic about solving it. The station manager saved it. He searched and found the solution.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtLS1LcmdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Poco para comer,pocos árboles para resguardarse y muy poco personal,con mucho calor larguísimas colas,otro detalle,ni galletas de arroz para celiacos,mientras estaba en la cola había 9 personas con ese problema

(Translated by Google)
Little to eat, few trees for shade, and very few staff; extremely hot with very long queues. Another detail: not even rice crackers for celiacs; while I was in queue, there were 9 people with that problem.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10372563260926081312/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMjVtWDJ3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lo mejor de la línea sur... Sólo deberían cambiar los surtidores que cada tanto tienen problemas y no les permite a los viajantes abastecerse de combustible.

(Translated by Google)
The best thing about the southern line... They should just replace the pumps, which occasionally have problems and prevent travelers from refueling.
